name: I Have a Plan to Take Down One of the Four Emperors!!

issues.description: SearchDeck action is incomplete: missing 'count' parameter (should be 4 cards looked at), missing 'filter' conditions (should filter for {Supernovas} or {Straw Hat Crew} type Characters), missing 'reveal' boolean (should reveal up to 1)
Incorrect trigger 'Trigger' and incorrect action 'DrawCard': this effect should not exist. The card effect ends with placing cards at bottom of deck; there is no separate draw or trigger action
SearchDeck should allow revealing up to 1 card matching type filter {Supernovas} or {Straw Hat Crew}, not drawing. 'Reveal' parameter missing
Missing action to handle placement of non-selected cards at bottom of deck (should include instruction for card ordering/placement)
